From robotic surgeries to comprehensive super-specialty services, Chandan Hospital Lucknow provides world-class healthcare under one roof, 24×7. World-Class Multi-Specialty Healthcare Serving Haldwani & Uttarakhand. A 200-bed multi-disciplinary super-specialty hospital in Haldwani, offering advanced diagnostics, critical care, and emergency services with state-of-the-art infrastructure. Book Appointment Book Health Check-Up Consult Online Find Doctor My Reports Schedule Your Appointment Online Book an appointment Select Location Comprehensive Specialties Under One Roof Delivering a full spectrum of specialty and super-specialty healthcare through advanced technology, experienced doctors, and integrated services ensuring seamless, high-quality, patient-centric treatment under one roof. Specialities Cancer Emergency Cardiology Blood Orthopaedics Anaesthesiology Dental Dermatology Endocrinology ENT Gastrointestinal Gastroenterology Hematology Medicine Neurosciences Gynaecology Ophthalmology Paediatrics Pain Psychiatry Radiodiagnosis Kidney Respiratory Spine Laboratory recruite educate Our Hospital Network Delivering trusted, multi-specialty healthcare across multiple locations with consistent quality, advanced infrastructure, and patient-focused medical excellence. Chandan Hospital, Lucknow Chandan Hospital, Haldwani Why Choose Us? We combine advanced medical technology, experienced specialists, and compassionate care to deliver reliable healthcare outcomes. With comprehensive specialties, 24/7 emergency services, modern infrastructure, and patient-first values, we ensure trusted, seamless, and high-quality treatment for every patient, every time. 2 Private healthcare network of Hospitals 50+ Diagnostic centres across India 50+ Pharmacies 1000+ Pin codes Served across India 200+ Doctors 500+ Beds Our Video Gallery Early Symptoms of Oral Cancer You Must Not Ignore | Expert Guide | Chandan Diagnostics Oral cancer often starts with small, painless symptoms that people tend to ignore. In this video, our expert explains the early warning signs of oral cancer, such as non-healing mouth ulcers,
                                        red or white patches, lumps in the mouth, difficulty chewing or swallowing, persistent mouth pain, and changes in voice. Early Symptoms of Oral Cancer You Must Not Ignore | Expert Guide | Chandan Diagnostics Oral cancer often starts with small, painless symptoms that people tend to ignore. In this video, our expert explains the early warning signs of oral cancer, such as non-healing mouth ulcers,
                                                    red or white patches, lumps in the mouth, difficulty chewing or swallowing, persistent mouth pain, and changes in voice. World Heart Day 2025 | Chandan Hospital Cardiac Experts Share Heart Care Tips On this World Heart Day, our expert cardiologists at Chandan Hospital - Dr. Jigar Kiritkumar Shah, Dr. Ritesh Kumar Pandey, Dr. Mukul Misra, and Dr. Danish Hasan Kazmi - urge everyone to make healthier lifestyle choices, follow a balanced diet, and prioritize heart health. Early Detection of Breast Cancer 💗 | Dr. Anshika Arora Explains Breast Self-Examination In this video, Dr. Anshika Arora, Surgical Oncologist, explains the importance of Breast Self-Examination (BSE)—a simple monthly habit that can help detect breast cancer at an early, more treatable stage. Liver Cirrhosis Warning Signs You Must Not Ignore | Tests That Detect It Early Many people discover Liver Cirrhosis too late — because the early signs are often ignored. In this video, our medical expert explains the key warning symptoms, risk indicators, and essential tests that help detect Liver Cirrhosis at an early stage. Patient Testimonials What Our Patients Say About Us Real experiences shared by patients and families who trusted us with their health and recovery. The doctors and nursing staff were extremely supportive throughout my treatment.
                                            From diagnosis to recovery, everything was well-coordinated and reassuring. Rajesh Verma Cardiology Patient Excellent facilities and compassionate care. The emergency team acted quickly
                                            and kept us informed at every step. We are truly grateful. Anita Sharma Emergency Care Patient’s Relative Clean environment, advanced technology, and doctors who genuinely listen.
                                            My surgery and recovery were smooth and stress-free. Mohd.
